title: NLC emerges as preferred bidder for a critical mineral block in Telangana
description: The announcement comes close on the heels of NLC signing an MoU with CSIR-Central Electrochemical Research Institute (CSIR-CECRI), Karaikudi, to foster collaboration in the field of critical and strategic minerals beneficiation and extraction technologies

title: The human cost of a deadly weed killer: banning of  paraqua in Telangana
description: In March, Telangana banned paraquat, one of the world’s most widely used and highly toxic weedicides, becoming only the third State in India to do so. The herbicide is responsible for hundreds of deaths each year, most of them by taking their own lives, and some accidental. Serish Nanisetti reports on the campaign that led to the ban and why much more remains to be done

title: Telangana sees tepid monsoon onset, no strong systems in sight
description: While there may be occasional bursts of heavy rain, most rainfall in the coming days will likely be light to moderate, according to meteorologists at the Telangana Development Planning Society

title: Folarin Balogun, who could have played for England or Nigeria, scores two goals for U.S. in World Cup debut
description: With retired England captain David Beckham looking on, Balogun became the first U.S. player to score multiple goals in a World Cup game since 1930

title: Folarin Balogun: The first American to score a World Cup brace since 1930
description: Folarin Balogun announced his commitment to the United States with a stunning World Cup debut, scoring twice against Paraguay. His brace, alongside goal from Reyna, secured a historic 4-1 victory for the US in their opening match.  Balogun's impressive performance marks a significant moment for American football.

title: Trump says U.S. military strike killed leader of Tren de Aragua gang with help from Venezuela
description: Tren de Aragua has been labelled by the United States as a terrorist organisation; Guerrero Flores was charged in a New York federal court with racketeering conspiracy and other crimes, including lending support to terrorists

title: FIFA World Cup: Balogun’s brace helps U.S. open home match with a dynamic 4-1 victory over Paraguay
description: In its first home World Cup in 32 years, the United States of America opened with a biggest win in the tournament

description: HR&CE Minister holds review meeting in Tiruchi, asks officials to give priority for providing basic facilities such as drinking water supply, sanitation, roads and bridges

BJP behaving like North Korean leader Kim Jong Un: Revanth Reddy
description: After illegally snatching Meenakshi Natarajan’s seat, the BJP and BRS were indulging in a misinformation campaign  like allegations of ‘coverts’ within the Congress to only divert attention

title: FIFA World Cup 2026 | USA VS Paraguay LIVE: U.S. wins 4-1 in dream start for World Cup co-hosts
description: Folarin Balogun scored the second and third goals for the U.S. in the 30th and 49th minutes of the match, which went into 98th minute

title: 1,569 days and counting: Russia-Ukraine war now longer than World War I
description: The Russia-Ukraine war has surpassed World War I in duration, now exceeding 1,569 days. What began as a swift Russian operation has become Europe's longest and bloodiest conflict since WWII, defying early predictions. Despite diplomatic efforts and Western support for Ukraine, a durable peace remains elusive, with no clear end in sight.

title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Canada’s Larin salvages 1-1 draw against Bosnia in Group B opener
description: Cyle Larin, when ​introduced in the 76th minute, made an immediate ⁠impact, swivelling in the box and ⁠firing home a deflected strike less than three minutes ‌later to equalise and send the home crowd into ​raptures.

title: Man loses Rs 80,000 after card gets stuck in ATM, SBI refunds amount now to pay for ‘mental agony’
Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX shares jump
description: The blockbuster operation, which raised more than $75 billion, is expected to kick off a series of major IPOs by AI companies in the coming months

title: Anthropic cuts access to AI models over U.S. ‘national security’ order
description: Just three days after publicly launching Fable 5, the company said in a blog post that it received a government directive banning all foreign nationals, even ones who work at Anthropic, from accessing Fable 5 and Mythos 5 over national security concerns

title: ‘Mistakes were made’: Mark Zuckerberg rules out more company-wide layoffs this year

description: Keeping Sanskrit as an option in all KVs ensures a smooth transition for students facing frequent transfers, letting others choose regional languages; some KVs face challenges of limited teachers and resources

title: File report on plea to implement tobacco-free institution guidelines: HC
description: Petitioner seeks a direction to authorities to strictly implement the guidelines in every school, establish Child Tobacco Cessation Centre in districts by appointing specialist to counsel children

title: Jaishankar speaks to Rubio, lodges strong protest over U.S. Navy attacks that killed three Indians
description: “Spoke to U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio this evening. I reiterated India’s strong protest at the attacks by the U.S. Navy in the Gulf that killed three Indian mariners,” Mr. Jaishankar said.

title: Donald Trump accuses Iran of attacking Indian ships; Tehran rejects charge as ‘baseless’
description: Three vessels with Indian crew came under attack off the Oman coast this week. One of them resulted in the death of three Indian seafarers on June 10, 2026

title: Bihar’s coaching empire, Khan Sir’s rise, and his reckoning
FIFA World Cup Day 2 recap: Wins for Canada, USA; Partey denied visa
The 8th CPC — a chance to reform pay commissions
description: The 8th Central Pay Commission should reform compensation frameworks, not merely salaries

title: Sulur sexual assault-cum-murder: accused get additional time to go through charge sheet
description: The special court grants additional time for Sulur sexual assault-cum-murder case accused to review 819-page chargesheet before next hearing

title: Municipality recruitment scam: ED raids 7 premises linked to TMC MLA Madan Mitra
description: The Enforcement Directorate searched seven locations tied to TMC MLA Madan Mitra as part of a municipal recruitment scam probe. Officials allege Mitra received cash and gold bribes via middlemen to secure jobs for unqualified individuals. Investigations suggest over 125 illegal appointments are linked to the former minister, with the ED continuing its examination.

title: Equality of treatment for Persons with Disabilities
description: India must adopt a minimum universal disability pension floor rate

description: Final report to be released after all investigative work has been completed, and the mandatory international review and consultation processes concluded, says Aircraft Accident Investigation Bureau

title: From Lebanon ceasefire to nukes: What's in Iran's 'Islamabad Agreement'?
description: Iran has outlined conditions for a potential US agreement, prioritizing sanctions relief and maritime access over immediate nuclear program discussions. Tehran insists on lifting the US naval blockade and a new arrangement for the Strait of Hormuz, while also seeking to include Lebanon in the deal.

title: CITU urges Haryana to extend deadline, publish Labour Code Rules in Hindi
Watch: US 'executes' Venezuela's 'bloodthirsty' prison gang leader Niño Guerrero in strike
description: US President Donald Trump announced a US military strike, conducted at his direction, killed Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores, known as Niño Guerrero, leader of the Venezuelan gang Tren de Aragua. Trump stated the operation was coordinated with Venezuelan authorities, linking it to his anti-crime and immigration agenda.  The gang is designated a foreign terrorist organization by Washington.

title: US, Iran likely to finalise draft agreement to end war: ‘Deal never closer’
Murari Babu, former TDB official accused in Sabarimala gold theft case, passes away
description: Murari Babu has been ailing for some time, and the death occurred around 12.48 a.m., said authorities of the Amrita Hospital in Kochi

title: West Asia war LIVE: U.S. forces shoot down Iranian attack drones, source says
description: Meanwhile, in Lebanon, Hezbollah said its fighters confronted Israeli forces advancing towards a southern Lebanese town, as Israel pressed on with its strikes

title: 'I am greater than death': How Jaspal Rana gave life to Tagore's 'Mrityunjay'
description: More than a decorated shooter and coach, Jaspal Rana's enduring legacy lay in his generosity and unwavering commitment to nurturing Indian shooting. Through anecdotes from those closest to him and the grief his passing left behind, this piece explores how Rana's life came to embody the spirit of Rabindranath Tagore's Mrityunjay, becoming, in essence, "greater than death".

description: The top court refused to quash criminal proceedings against a Maharashtra doctor under the Pre-Conception and Pre-Natal Diagnostic Techniques (Prohibition of Sex Selection) Act, 1994

title: Katy Perry kisses Justin Trudeau after headlining World Cup opening ceremony- WATCH
description: Katy Perry and Justin Trudeau made a public display of affection at the FIFA World Cup 2026 opening ceremony in Los Angeles. Perry delivered a powerful performance, later seen rushing to Trudeau for a kiss. The couple also held hands while watching a match, following their red carpet debut at the Tribeca Film Festival.

That Summer of ’86 when Maradona, Socrates changed our sleepy town forever
World Cup 2026: Neymar carries burden of Brazil’s resurrection into last chance saloon
description: The 34-year-old is no longer central to his country’s football identity, but still is its biggest star. After three failed attempts at claiming the sport’s most prized trophy, he will again be confronted by the existential question asked of every great in a Selecao shirt: can you win the World Cup?

title: Jeff Bezos says his new startup doesn’t have any corporate ties with Amazon or Blue Origin
description: Jeff Bezos' AI startup, Prometheus, has secured a massive $12 billion in funding, valuing the company at $41 billion. This significant investment aims to revolutionize physical goods design and manufacturing by creating an 'artificial general engineer.

title: SpaceX IPO makes Musk world’s first trillionaire; he promises ‘we are taking you to Moon’
description: SpaceX's public debut has propelled its valuation over $2 trillion, making Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire. Musk declared the IPO a launchpad for a grander vision: making space travel accessible to everyone, not just astronauts. He aims to build the commercial infrastructure for sci-fi futures, promising to take ordinary citizens to the Moon, Mars, and beyond.

title: A deal with U.S. ‘has never been closer’, says Iran
description: Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi’s comments came after Iran’s Mehr news agency, citing a source close to the country’s negotiating team, claimed that the deal would see “the release of $24 billion of Iran’s blocked funds during the 60-day final negotiation period”

title: Monsoon 2026 LIVE: IMD issues red alert for thunderstorms, lightning in Delhi
description: Heavy rains that lashed several parts of Hyderabad on June 12 evening and continued through the night disrupted flight operations at the Rajiv Gandhi International Airport

title: Two years after father, son and daughter die in blaze at Delhi home
Indian-origin man sentenced to 34-years for kidnaping, raping woman
description: An Indian-origin man, Gagandeep Singh, has been sentenced to 34 years in prison in the UK for kidnapping, torturing, and raping a woman. The 34-year-old was convicted of multiple serious offenses after a trial. He will serve 28 years in custody, followed by an extended license period, and will be deported after completing his sentence.

title: Jaspal Rana – a giant of Indian shooting who leaves behind a legacy
description: In 1994, he won the World Championship junior gold, apart from two gold medals, one silver and a bronze in the Commonwealth Games and one gold and as many bronze in the Asian Games in Hiroshima

title: Judge keeps order in place to remove Trump's name from Kennedy Centre
description: U.S. District Judge Christopher Cooper said he would not lift the order while a federal appeals court considers his ruling that ‌only Congress could rename the venue memorializing former President John F. Kennedy in the nation’s capital

description: Here is a select list of stories to start the day.

title: Amid rising inflation, vigilance holds the key
Exclusive: BMC proposes Ladki Bahin-style aid for domestic workers, seeks state nod
Modi heads to France today: How trust has underpinned India-France ties
India vs Afghanistan 1st ODI Live Streaming: When and where to watch IND vs AFG 1st ODI?
Even more than unity, Opposition needs a paradigm shift in its politics
IND vs AFG ODIs: Spotlight on Rohit Sharma as World Cup auditions begin for 2027
description: Rohit Sharma faces an audition for his ODI future, needing to prove his fitness and form ahead of the next World Cup. Captain Shubman Gill grapples with selection decisions, potentially looking beyond the veteran. The series against Afghanistan also serves as a platform to test new batting combinations with Virat Kohli sidelined.

title: One year after AI 171 crash, questions persist
When a royal family dispute turns violent: Shots fired inside historic Madhya Pradesh fort

Anyone trying to disrupt NEET UG 2026 retest to face full might of law: Government
Can you really become a morning person in just three days?
Sooryavanshi's viral look returns as Mudau's VAR reaction trends at FIFA WC
description: Football fans at the Mexico City stadium were amused by South African players' bewildered expressions during a FIFA World Cup match. A VAR announcement left them confused, reminding Indian fans of a similar viral moment involving cricketer Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. The incident occurred during the Mexico vs South Africa clash, highlighting a shared moment of bewilderment across sports.

title: The Taylor Swift effect is real and Christen Goff has the DMs to prove it
description: Christen Goff, wife of Detroit Lions quarterback Jared Goff, appeared on PEOPLE's WAG World series and credited Taylor Swift with fundamentally reshaping her social media audience. The Sports Illustrated Swimsuit model said her followers were once dominated by male fantasy football users but have since shifted to include large numbers of women interested in NFL life. Christen also spoke about her first season as a mother, bringing newborn daughter Romy to games just three months after her birth, and her excitement about the upcoming season with a daughter old enough to engage with game day.

title: 'Peddi' BO day 9: Ram Charan film earns Rs 286.38 cr
description: Ram Charan's 'Peddi' continues its strong box office run, nearing the Rs 200 crore net mark in India despite a slight dip on Day 9. The sports action drama has amassed Rs 198.70 crore net domestically and Rs 286.38 crore worldwide. Critics praise Charan's committed performance, highlighting his portrayal of a fight for identity and self-respect.

title: Developing India's Iron Dome: DRDO conducts 3 successful missile trials
Canada vs Bosnia and Herzegovina highlights | FIFA World Cup 2026: Canada draws 1-1 with Bosnia-Herzegovina
description: Co-hosts Canada grabbed a second-half equaliser to draw 1-1 with Bosnia-Herzegovina in the first World Cup finals game ever played on Canadian soil; Cyle Larin got Canada's goal after Jovo Lukic put Bosnia ahead with a header on 21 minutes in Toronto

title: Psych evaluation of parents a must in child custody disputes, rules SC
description: Writing the judgment, Justice N Kotiswar Singh said, “While it is important to make an assessment as to how a child will respond to either of the parents, it is equally important to ascertain mental and psychological conditions of the parents themselves to deal with the needs of the growing child.” SC said the assessment of the parents’ psychological conditions must be conducted prior to a similar assessment of the child to understand compatibility with each of the parents.

title: Bangladesh border guards raise pushback issue at BSF meet
NDA looks to boost numbers in Lok Sabha, Sena UBT may also split
description: Sources within NDA suggest one of the parties that may see desertion from its ranks is Sena UBT, a possibility being talked about since the alliance swept the assembly polls in Maharashtra but has gained traction now. The Uddhav Thackeray-led party has nine MPs in Lok Sabha and six of them will have to merge with another party — Shiv Sena led by deputy CM Eknath Shinde seen as the most probable option — to avoid losing membership under the anti-defection law.

title: Suspect dead after Texas shooting kills one, leaves nine others in hospital
description: Midland police said the active shooter situation ended hours after the gunfire erupted in one part of the city before ending up near a veterinary hospital.

title: IND vs AFG: Orange alert, thunderstorms and hail threat loom over 1st ODI
description: Rain and thunderstorms threaten to disrupt the first ODI between India and Afghanistan in Dharamsala. With key players like Virat Kohli and Hardik Pandya already out, the weather forecast predicts wet conditions and a significant chance of precipitation on match day. Fans are concerned that the DLS method might be needed if play is affected.

title: Rebel TMC MPs ready game plan, look to meet Speaker Om Birla Monday for recognition
Rebels claim 19 MPs in ‘real TMC’ fight, set to meet Speaker
description: While none from the rebel camp contested the screenshots, almost everyone voiced grievance against Abhishek Banerjee. Lashing out, Abhishek said, “BJP has been trying many tactics — from creating rift in our party to intimidating party workers, taking over party offices, and destroying our organisation. But no matter what they do, they cannot deny the fact that 2.6 crore people voted for us and we got a 41% votes. We will continue to fight against this oppression.”

title: Texas shooting: 1 dead, 10 injured in Midland; suspect found after standoff
Pranit More biryani row: KEM probe finds MBBS student’s remarks ‘insensitive’
Govt notifies order to cap bulk fuel buys during crunch
description: Institutional, industrial and commercial consumers can be directed not to procure petrol or diesel from retail outlets and instead source their requirements through authorised bulk channels. Retail outlets may be barred from selling more than 200 litres of diesel to a customer or vehicle in a day, while fuel procured under the provision cannot be resold.

title: Air India crash, a year later: At crash site, families and friends sift for memories and a life that once was
Despite rift, Rahul Gandhi says DMK with opposition on ‘idea of India’
description: Alleging BJP steals elections, Rahul said he had warned “friends in TMC”, who were confident that they were sweeping Bengal polls, that they were in “dreamland” — stating he had seen it in Gujarat, Madhya Pradesh, Chhattisgarh, Haryana and Maharashtra. He said BJP can’t win the next polls, “which is already won”, because people are angry, but the hurdle is that elections will not be free and fair.

title: Ex-RCom execs Doshi & Seth arrested by ED in ADAG case
description: ED’s case against Ambani and his group entities and associates is handled by a special investigation team constituted at the agency’s headquarters here. The duo, along with Amitabh Jhunjhunwala, who is in judicial custody, comprised the core leadership team of Ambani. Doshi was earlier arrested in 2011 by CBI in its 2G spectrum scam case and was behind bars for seven months before he was granted bail.

title: Neymar was ruled out of Brazil’s clash with Morocco after a major injury blow
description: Neymar will miss FIFA World Cup 2026 opener between Brazil and Morocco due to a calf injury suffered in May. Brazil coach Carlo Ancelotti confirmed the forward is recovering well and could return next week. Neymar has not played for Brazil since 2023. Brazil begin their Group C campaign under pressure as they chase their first World Cup title since 2002.

title: 'No writs after polls begin': Supreme Court rejects Meenakshi Natarajan's plea
description: After an hour-long proceeding, during which senior advocate Mukul Rohatgi for the BJP candidate whose election was facilitated by Natarajan’s disqualification and solicitor general Tushar Mehta for MP govt cited a judgment where SC had refused to entertain a similar plea against rejection of nomination papers, the bench said the SC or HC cannot entertain writ petitions in exercise of their jurisdictions under Articles 32 or 226 of the Constitution. Once the election process commences with the notification of polls.

title: Price cap on 2 key cancer drugs increased by 50%
description: The regulator has also revised prices of anti-tetanus immunoglobulin and three key childhood vaccines to ensure their continued availability. The decision, for which a gazette notification has been issued, was taken at NPPA's 147th meeting on Thursday, where the authority invoked its extraordinary powers under Para 19 of the Drug Price Control Order (DPCO), 2013, to revise prices of formulations considered critical for public health.

title: Record SpaceX IPO rockets Trill'Elon'aire Musk as stock ends at $161
description: Despite the excitement, SpaceX remains unprofitable and generates significantly less revenue than several technology companies with comparable market valuations. The listing proceeded without major disruptions, in contrast to some high-profile public offerings of the past. Trading began late on Friday morning and the stock eventually closed at $160.95 per share, giving the company a market capitalisation of approximately $2.1 trillion.

title: Bangalore-Based BNM Institute of Technology Assures Industry Readiness - Extends Academics to Overall Emotional, Mental, Spiritual, Social, and Occupational Wellness
description: South-Bangalore based institution blends legacy pedagogy with human-first practices to promote entrepreneurship through overall personality development in the new admission season

title: Dragonpass APAC Loyalty Index: 53% of High-Income Consumers Say Bank Rewards No Longer Match Their Lifestyle Needs
BAIC FOTON eView Connect Makes a Strong Debut in Thailand, Pioneering a New Paradigm for Green Logistics in Southeast Asia
Skylark Drones and e2E Rail Partner to Advance AI-Powered Drone Intelligence for Railway Infrastructure
description: Strategic partnership combines railway engineering expertise and AI-powered asset intelligence to support smarter infrastructure monitoring, surveying, and lifecycle management

title: President Droupadi Murmu Confers Kirti Chakra on Chandigarh University Alumnus Major Arshdeep Singh Gill
description: “Chandigarh University not only provides quality education but also instills a spirit of patriotism,” says Deepinder Sandhu

title: Delhi HC issues notice to ‘Kala Hiran’ makers on Salman Khan’s petition
description: Appearing for Mr. Khan, advocate Nizam Pasha submitted that a poster released on May 29 depicted an individual bearing a striking resemblance to Mr. Khan, including his distinctive bracelet.

title: Punjab may go to polls in November, Mann to return as CM: Kejriwal
description: “I have been told that the elections will be held in November [2026], not February [2027]. Only four months are left. Now we all have only one task — to make Bhagwant Singh Mann Chief Minister again,” said the ruling party’s national convener.

title: El Niño here, 63% chance it will be super strong: US
description: The update released late Thursday by Climate Prediction Center and other agencies under US’ National Ocean and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) gave a 63% chance of the El Niño strengthening into a “very strong” event by Nov-Jan “that would rank among the largest El Niño events in the historical record going back to 1950”.

title: USA vs Paraguay FIFA World Cup 2026 HIGHLIGHTS: USA beat Paraguay 4-1
Maharashtra to table ‘Women Farmers Empowerment Bill’ during upcoming Monsoon Session
description: Mr. Fadnavis reviewed a preliminary presentation on the draft Bill at a meeting attended by Deputy Chief Minister Sunetra Ajit Pawar, Agriculture Minister Dattatray Bharane and Minister of State for Agriculture Ashish Jaiswal at his official residence on Friday

title: US-Iran peace hopes spark market rally, indices surge 2%
Candidates get 15 minutes extra time for NEET retest
description: The retest comes after cancellation of the May 3 exam following paper leak, which is being probed by CBI. In a notice, NTA said the exam — for admissions to medical colleges — will be held from 2 pm to 5.15 pm. The additional 15 minutes will accommodate mandatory formalities (attendance signing and other procedures).

title: Forecasts indicate El Niño to grow stronger during monsoon: IMD
description: “El Niño conditions are present over equatorial Pacific Ocean and are expected to strengthen during monsoon season,” IMD said, while announcing the advent of the condition — warming of ocean waters in central and eastern equatorial Pacific — that’s invariably linked with weak monsoon in India. The latest forecast could be used by policymakers to immediately activate contingency measures in all 197 districts across the country that have been identified by the agriculture ministry as most vulnerable to impacts of El Niño.

title: Odisha CM announces free education from KG to PG in govt. institutions
description: The State launches Chief Minister Annapurna Yojana, under which all beneficiaries of the National Food Security Act and State Food Security Scheme will receive, an additional 5 kg of rice per month free of cost

title: The beauty and benefit of comradeship in cut-throat athletics
description: Rivalries need not be bitter and damaging. When done right, they can push athletes to heights they could not have achieved alone. They also add a life-affirming tone to high-stakes competition. The recent Federation meet in Ranchi showcased many such battles

title: No formal proposal yet, say senior NCP(SP) leaders amid buzz over merger with Congress
description: While the Congress’s Maharashtra unit has refused comment on speculations about the merger, sources said a proposal to this effect has been in the pipeline for some time.

title: ED arrests two former executives of Reliance Anil Ambani Group
description: The ED has taken transit remand of Sateesh Seth and Gautam Doshi, both of whom previously served as directors of Reliance Telecom Ltd., and is taking them to Delhi as the case is registered in the national capital, they said.

title: 'Lethal actions against commercial shipping not justified': EAM lodges 'strong protest' with Rubio
description: Jaishankar's remarks came in the aftermath of a US military strike on the commercial tanker MT Settebello in the Gulf of Oman, which claimed the lives of three Indian crew members. The vessel was targeted on Wednesday after US forces alleged that it had breached the naval blockade imposed on Iranian ports. Of the 24 Indian nationals aboard the tanker, 21 were rescued, while three were later confirmed dead.

title: T20 World Cup: Danni Wyatt-Hodge's ton powers England to big win over SL
description: England launched their ICC Women's T20 World Cup 2026 campaign with a resounding 87-run victory over Sri Lanka at Edgbaston. Danni Wyatt-Hodge's unbeaten century powered England to a record 219/1, the highest team total in tournament history. Their bowlers then restricted Sri Lanka to 132, securing a dominant start.

title: Will bring Tatas to Bengal but land at Singur no longer belongs to govt., says Bengal CM
description: The Chief Minister who has been in office for about five weeks says that benefits of the double-engine government are slowly reaching the people of West Bengal

title: Severe thunderstorm batters Delhi-NCR; IMD issues red alert, warns of 100 kmph gusts
Road, drainage works progressing along Palarivattom corridor
description: The laying of interlocking tiles has been completed over a short stretch in front of St. Martin’s Church at Palarivattom, while groundwork, including the spreading of metal and surface levelling, is under way

title: Invisible tropical waves linked to extreme rainfall, says study
description: The study reveals that invisible atmospheric disturbances known as Kelvin, Rossby and Mixed Rossby-Gravity waves significantly enhance heavy rainfall by organising deep convective cloud systems and increasing moisture convergence over the Arabian Sea and the Western Ghats

title: Police propose measures to tackle Kochi city’s traffic woes on a war footing
description: Identified traffic choke points include Edappally, Palarivattom, Cheranalloor, Edachira, Vyttila, Thiruvankulam, Thevara, Bolgatty Junction, Pallimukku, High Court Jn., Kaloor and Kadavanthra

title: High Court directs panel to proceed with demolition of Chander Kunj Army towers
description: Firm that demolished Maradu flats gets nod for twin towers’ demolition; court declines to stay award of demolition contract to Edifice Engineering despite challenge by lowest bidder

title: Malayidamthuruth land dispute talks hit hurdle
description: Minister-led meeting scheduled to discuss a proposal to avoid the eviction of seven Dalit families from the 2.69-acre Pariyathukavu settlement postponed to a later date

title: Now, fire in Tughlakabad  kills three of a family; two critical
description: 40 people rescued from 5-storey building: District Magistrate; spark while charging scooter may have caused blaze: police; everyone was screaming for help, neighbours started throwing buckets of water, but it made no difference, says resident

title: Man convicted 24 days after FIR for harassing Census enumerator
CM Gupta expresses grief over deaths; share reports on recent fire incidents: AAP
Retail inflation at 16-month high of 3.9% as food items get dearer
description: Tomato and rice prices go up; higher fuel prices push up transport costs

title: NHAI says compensation for sandalwood farmer deposited in court
Watch: Sonakshi Sinha reveals her simple hack for perfect winged eyeliner
Accidental grenade blast wounds 2 soldiers in J&K’s Poonch
CM Omar Abdullah seeks Awantipora airbase use as Srinagar alternative
description: Omar pointed out that the south Kashmir airbase was used as an alternative during similar closures of Srinagar airport in 1998 and 2010, as he emphasised the importance of maintaining air connectivity to the Valley during the peak tourism season. Omar also sought “the maintenance schedule be reviewed and, if feasible, shortened, phased, or shifted to a leaner travel window”.

title: AFSPA debate returns to J&K as minister seeks its repeal before North East
description: Sakina Itoo Itoo is only woman minister in the Omar Abdullah cabinet and is highly regarded within the governing party. AFSPA was extended to J&K on Sept 10, 1990. During his first tenure as chief minister from 2009 to 2014, Omar had repeatedly advocated the phased withdrawal of AFSPA from “peaceful areas.”

title: What ‘Rich Dad Poor Dad’ teaches about building wealth beyond a 9-to-5 job
HC tells Uttarakhand govt not to deport Pak Sikhs if they pose no threat
description: The Uttarakhand High Court has halted the deportation of a Pakistani Sikh family residing in Dehradun on a long-term visa. The court directed the state government not to deport them unless they pose a national security risk. The family, in India since 2019, challenged a 24-hour departure notice, citing their valid visa and children's education.

title: US weighed ground operation to seize Iran's uranium, Trump paused it: Report
description: America considered sending troops to Iran to seize its nuclear material. President Donald Trump paused the plan due to worries about retaliation and American lives. The operation faced high to extreme risk. Securing Iran's uranium remains a US goal. Discussions occurred amid nuclear program negotiations.

title: One year after Air India Ahmedabad crash, no report released
description: The London-bound AI171 crashed immediately after taking off from Ahmedabad airport on June 12, 2025. Of the 242 people on board, 241 were killed, and 19 other victims were from the ground at the hostel complex of Ahmedabad’s B J Medical College that the plane crashed into. The closest international parallel to AI171 may be Ethiopian Airlines Flight 302, the 2019 Boeing 737 MAX crash that killed 157 people.

title: David Hockney dies at 88: 5 things to know about the artist who made pools iconic
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's 10-year-old younger brother Aashirwad slams century
description: Younger brother Aashirwad Sooryavanshi, aged 10, has scored a brilliant century in a local practice match, mirroring the cricketing talent of his elder brother Vaibhav. Vaibhav, a teenage sensation, proudly shared Aashirwad's achievement on social media while he is currently on tour with India A.

description: Cristiano Ronaldo pushed back against fitness concerns ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after ESPN FC shared his response to reporters. The Portugal captain said, “Physically? I’m fine. Have you not seen my matches?” While some fans supported his confidence, others questioned his recent performances, keeping the debate around his World Cup future firmly in the spotlight.

His vision for reusable rockets and interplanetary colonies has captured the imagination of investors, turning space exploration into an enticing financial frontier. This remarkable shift in wealth underscores a new chapter in capitalism, expanding its reach beyond conventional sectors.
